summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BulgarcaKolayca LMS Panel. All backend APIs (23/23 tests passed - 100%) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Teacher login, student registration, dashboard tabs, lesson creation, and material management all functional.
passed_tests: Teacher login with credentials teacher@bulgarcakolayca.com / teacher123
Student registration flow with pending approval message
Student login blocked when pending approval (403)
JWT token authentication for protected endpoints
Get current user (/auth/me) with valid token
UI: Login page loads with all form elements
UI: Teacher dashboard tabs (Overview, Students, Lessons, Materials, Notifications)
UI: Student registration page with success message
UI: Create lesson modal with form fields
UI: Create material modal with Drive/Dropbox link support
UI: Bulgarian flag colors theme (white, green, red)
seed_data_creation: Teacher account already exists in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: LMS Panel fully functional. Backend uses custom JWT with sha256 password hashing. Teacher account exists. Test students created with TEST_ prefix during testing. All CRUD operations for lessons, materials, students, and notifications working. Panel routes at /panel/* (login, register, teacher, student).

teacher_dashboard.overview_tab: Working - Shows stats and pending students
teacher_dashboard.students_tab: Working - List, approve, reject, add, delete students
teacher_dashboard.lessons_tab: Working - Create, view, delete lessons with Zoom links
teacher_dashboard.materials_tab: Working - Create, view, delete materials with Drive/Dropbox links
teacher_dashboard.notifications_tab: Working - View and mark as read
